body.visualDesc: Medium shot on the coop porch at golden dusk. The tiny lemon-yellow duckling with flat orange bill is nestled in the golden straw nest, eyes drooping sleepily. Pip (straw hat, red bandana) tucks straw around the duckling tenderly. Mo (blue-grey, red knitted scarf) hums softly, eyes half-closed, content. Bo (tan, round wire-framed eyeglasses, green scarf) sits beside them, chin on her wings, smiling. CRITICAL: there is NO whole egg anywhere - the egg has hatched; only two small EMPTY broken eggshell halves lie beside the nest. The welcome mat and porch railing frame the cozy scene. Fireflies dot the warm air.
